calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: off calendar
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Taylor Porter appeared via zoom for David Hegert (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated November 14, 2024 is admitted to probate. David Hegert is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 8, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
